- Breaking / major initiative replans: **new file** (`development-plan-v2.md`, …) per repository doc-edition norms; link the prior edition in **§2 Linked inputs → Baseline / superseded plans**.

**Optional compat pointer (repository choice):**

- A short **`docs/development-plan.md`** may point humans to the current edition (“see `development-plan-v1.md`”). Do **not** replace the editioned file with unrelated content unless governance requires a single canonical name.

content.text:
Here is what was done.

### Removed
- **`docs/development-plan.md`** (the short redirect) is deleted.

### Updates so everything uses **`docs/development-plan-v1.md`**
- **`AGENTS.md`** — dropped the “optional pointer” note.
- **`.cursor/rules/docs-governance.mdc`** — only lists editioned `development-plan-v1.md`.
- **`docs/development-plan-v1.md`** — **§2 Linked inputs** has no “Pointer (optional)” row (only the editioned plan + baseline/superseded).
- **`docs/product-requirements-v1.md`**, **`docs/technical-design-v1.md`**, **`docs/tech-stack.md`**, **`docs/implementation-log.md` (related-docs row)** — removed the extra pointer link and any “([pointer](…))” phrasing; PRD/TDD revision lines that described the old pointer are adjusted where they were user-facing.
- **`docs/templates/development-plan-template.md`** — governance note no longer mentions an optional unversioned pointer.
- **`.cursor/skills/development-planner/SKILL.md`** — removed the **“Optional compat pointer”** block.
- **`.cursor/skills/developer-manager/SKILL.md`** — dropped optional pointer from the doc-sync list.

### Implementation log
- New entry **“Remove `development-plan.md` pointer doc”** records this change.
- The older **2026-04-30 — Development plan versioning** entry now states the pointer was added then **removed 2026-05-07**, so it stays accurate.

### Verification
- **`[anything](development-plan.md)`** markdown links: **none** left outside **`docs/agent-chats/`** (archived JSONL only).
- Remaining uses of the string `development-plan.md` are **implementation-log prose** (describing removal / history), not links to a live doc.
- **`scripts/check-docs.ps1`**: **OK**

**Note:** Archived transcripts under **`docs/agent-chats/*.jsonl`** still contain old paths in historical tool calls; they were not edited. If you want those archives scrubbed too, say so.
